## 🏗 Project Scope
- [ ] React & Vite Learning Path
- [ ] Flask & Swagger Integration
- [ ] Supabase Integration
- [ ] Vercel Deployment

## 📑 Feature Checklist
### Frontend
- [ ] Workbook View (`/react`, `/flask`)
- [ ] Practice Interaction Screens
- [ ] Dark Mode Support

### Backend
- [ ] Swagger API Documentation (`/swagger`)
- [ ] API routes for progress tracking
- [ ] Supabase Proxy layer

## 🚀 Deployment Plan
1. Connect GitHub Repository to Vercel
2. Setup environment variables for Supabase
3. Deploy!

## 🧪 Testing Strategy
- Manual testing of all Workbook interactive elements.
- Swagger endpoint validation.
